## Diagnostics

Include redacted output from:

```sh
hermes-live print-config
hermes-live doctor
```

From a built source checkout, replace `hermes-live` with `node dist/cli.js`.

## Logs

Do not paste API keys, bearer tokens, session tokens, private audio, prompts, tool arguments, or provider credentials.
